text: Home Page New - Regal-hospital Home Page New - Regal-hospital Skip to content About us Doctors Specialties Urology Nephrology Anaesthesiology Accident & Emergency Cosmetic Surgery Cardiology Dentistry Dermatology Neurology Diabetology ENT Gastroenterology Gastrointestinal Surgery General Medicine Internal Medicine Neurosurgery Obstetrics and Gynaecology Orthopaedics Paediatrics Radiology Pulmonology Vascular Surgery Facilities Contact us X Facebook-f Instagram Youtube Linkedin Book an Appointment 888 405 6611 Regal Hospital - Bangalore’s Premier Multispecialty and Kidney Care Destination Premier Kidney Care Facility in Bangalore! Regal Hospital , a leading multispecialty healthcare institution in Bangalore, offers advanced kidney care with state-of-the-art facilities. Located on Thanisandra-Yelahanka Road, near the proposed Bharathiya City, the hospital features cutting-edge infrastructure designed to deliver exceptional medical care. Committed to providing accessible and cost-effective healthcare, Regal Hospital specializes in a wide range of medical treatments, including kidney transplantation, kidney biopsy, dialysis, and surgeries, adhering to the highest standards of quality and safety. Our mission is to make high-quality medical care available to everyone while maintaining affordability. Read more OPD 0 Admissions 0 Dialysis 0 Surgeries 0 Cases of kidney stones treated 0 Kidney problems treated 0 Beds 0 ICU 0 Dr. Suriraju V is a renowned urologist in Tirumanahalli, Bengaluru. At Regal Hospital in Bengaluru, he offers medical counseling and surgical treatments in the field of urology. He is widely regarded as a professional leader in his field and has dedicated his life to freeing people from kidney diseases and disorders. Dr. Suriraju V MD and CEO, Regal Hospital, Bengaluru Department of Urology Author of ‘Kidney Secrets Revealed’ Get It On Any Device Love to read on the road? Get the ebook on Amazon Kindle Store. Every kidney problem has a solution. Dr. Suriraju V’s book ‘Kidney Secrets Revealed’ provides straight-forward answers to kidney problems. The book also addresses the alarmingly high rate of increase in kidney problems in India, which is attributed to poor habits, diabetes, and hypertension. Read the book now to discover more! How does laser surgery for hemorrhoids compare to traditional surgery? Laser Hemorrhoidoplasty (LHP) is a minimally invasive procedure that uses laser energy to shrink tissue. Unlike traditional cutting methods, it typically results in less post-operative pain and a much faster recovery time. Can kidney damage from diabetes be reversed? While established structural damage is usually permanent, progression can be slowed or halted. Key strategies include strict blood sugar management, blood pressure control, and specific medications like SGLT2 inhibitors. Which foods are "bladder-friendly" and which should I avoid? Safe: Pears, bananas, and lean proteins. Avoid: Caffeine, alcohol, spicy foods, and acidic citrus, as these are known bladder irritants. What are the main types of dialysis? The two main types are Hemodialysis (using an external machine to filter blood) and Peritoneal Dialysis (using the lining of your abdomen as a natural filter). What factors influence the cost of dialysis? Costs are influenced by the treatment setting (at-home vs. clinic), frequency of sessions, insurance coverage, and the cost of supplemental medications for anemia or bone health.
